page.title: Budget
page.description: Hard caps. Soft alerts. No surprise invoices.

scope.label: Configure budget for
scope.globalDescription: Applied to all requests across all projects.
scope.projectDescription: Applied to requests for this project only.

tokens.perDayDescription: Block or alert when daily usage exceeds this.
tokens.perMonthDescription: Block or alert when monthly usage exceeds this.

cost.perDayDescription: Block or alert when daily spend exceeds this.
cost.perMonthDescription: Block or alert when monthly spend exceeds this.

alert.thresholdDescription: Send an alert when usage reaches this percentage of the limit.

hardStop.label: Hard stop
hardStop.description: Block all requests when the limit is reached. Disable to receive alerts only.

errors.invalid_value: Enter a positive number or leave blank for no limit.
errors.day_exceeds_month_tokens: Daily limit cannot exceed monthly limit.
errors.day_exceeds_month_cost: Daily cost limit cannot exceed monthly cost limit.
errors.exceeds_plan_limit: Exceeds your plan limit of {limit} tokens/month.
errors.project_exceeds_global: This limit exceeds your global workspace budget. The global cap will trigger first — set a lower value.
